'''dawoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelization|nickelization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelization|nickelization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dawoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæweseth|dæweseth]] || [[word:dæwesej|dæwesej]] || [[word:dæwesesh|dæwesesh]] || [[word:dæwese|dæwese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawowosoth|dawowosoth]] || [[word:dawowosoj|dawowosoj]] || [[word:dawowososh|dawowososh]] || [[word:dawowoso|dawowoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawosoth|dawosoth]] || [[word:dawosoj|dawosoj]] || [[word:dawososh|dawososh]] || [[word:dawoso|dawoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawofsoth|dawofsoth]] || [[word:dawofsoj|dawofsoj]] || [[word:dawofsosh|dawofsosh]] || [[word:dawofsof|dawofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawosotho|dawosotho]] || [[word:dawosojo|dawosojo]] || [[word:dawososho|dawososho]] || [[word:dawosoko|dawosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawosoth|dawosoth]] || [[word:dawosoj|dawosoj]] || [[word:dawososh|dawososh]] || [[word:dawoso|dawoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawosothol|dawosothol]] || [[word:dawosojol|dawosojol]] || [[word:dawososhol|dawososhol]] || [[word:dawosokol|dawosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawosothotho|dawosothotho]] || [[word:dawosojojo|dawosojojo]] || [[word:dawososhosho|dawososhosho]] || [[word:dawosoko|dawosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawosothon|dawosothon]] || [[word:dawosojon|dawosojon]] || [[word:dawososhon|dawososhon]] || [[word:dawosokon|dawosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawosothoro|dawosothoro]] || [[word:dawosojoro|dawosojoro]] || [[word:dawososhoro|dawososhoro]] || [[word:dawosokoro|dawosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
